title: Filter outlook automation with dynamic values

posts.author: nvr (Niels)
posts.cookedHtml:
in the automation called: ‘When an email is received, create an item in group’ (Outlook integration), is a filter for selecting which mails should be integrated. The filter indicates to ‘find mails that matches the particular characteristics’.

I would like to filter based on the subject of the received mail, which is actually possible. But for the value I must be filtered on, I would like to refer with a dynamic value to an item name in a Monday table. In this filter I can only set manually an value, but I cannot connect it to table/column values.

In the picture I set manually the value, where I want to integrate the dynamic value.

AUTOMATIONS DYNAMIC VALUE FILTER973×306 27 KB
